client.label: Customer side
client.blurb: Ask what your customers would ask
client.greeting: Hi, glad you stopped by. We handle plumbing, HVAC, and electrical work for homes and small commercial across Canada and the US. What is going on at your place today?
chips: An outlet stopped working in my kitchen

professional.label: Contractor side
professional.blurb: See how this would work on your own website
professional.greeting: Hey, take a look around. This is a working intelligent chat system built for trade contractors who run plumbing, HVAC, or electrical shops (or all three). It handles inbound from your website around the clock, screens the timewasters, books real service calls, and flags emergencies so they reach you fast. Ask me how any piece of that works.
chips: How does it handle emergency calls?
How does the booking flow work?
What does it cost to set up?
